Template 1 — Monday Industry Insight Mockup · Sample copy

1080×1080 square · Type-driven (no photo) · For sign-off only — copy is placeholder

{KICKER}
{SOURCE_LABEL} · {POST_DATE}

{HEADLINE}
One line, sentence case, lands like a headline.

{TAG_1} {TAG_2} {TAG_3}
Blick.
www.blick.group

Template 1 — Monday Industry Insight

Concept

Editorial pull-quote card. Ink-black canvas, sentence-case headline at scale, single brand orange rule, discipline chips, Blick mark + URL. Reads like an FT headline card. No photo dependency.

Replaceable fields

  • {KICKER} — small mono label, e.g. "Industry insight"
  • {SOURCE_LABEL} — e.g. "Reuters" or "Trenchless Australasia"
  • {POST_DATE} — published date, e.g. "5 May 2026"
  • {HEADLINE} — the news hook, sentence case, ~80–100 chars max
  • {TAG_1..3} — discipline / region tags

Hard rules

  • Sentence case, never ALL CAPS
  • No em dashes anywhere
  • Brand orange used once: the rule. No second orange element.
  • Footer always Blick mark left, URL right, mono small caps URL

Type

  • Headline: Inter 800, ~88pt at full 1080×1080 (44pt at 540 preview)
  • Kicker: JetBrains Mono 500, 22pt
  • Chips: Inter 500, 20pt, 1px white-40% border
  • Footer mark: Inter 800; URL: JetBrains Mono 400

Sign-off questions

Does the layout work? Headline placement, chip placement, footer treatment, brand orange usage. Don't read the placeholder copy as content — react to the structure. If approved, this becomes the master we fill via runner.js for every Monday post.
